summary: The protagonist, Alley Boss, secures his 11th consecutive victory in the Colosseum, rising to rank 2. He is matched against the former rank 1 player, Taeka, in a highly anticipated stream that draws significant attention. Despite Taeka's legendary reputation as the 'King of the Colosseum,' Alley Boss defeats him, leaving only the current rank 1 player remaining as his final challenge.
key_moments: Alley Boss reaches rank 2 after achieving his 11th victory.
Alley Boss is matched against the legendary player Taeka in a ranked Colosseum match.
Alley Boss defeats Taeka through strategic combat and skill usage, prompting Taeka to acknowledge his strength.
